adds.rationale: First and only US-listed pure-play quantum computing company; quantum is explicitly named in the profile as a next wave and the watchlist currently has zero quantum exposure.

news_evidence.summary: IonQ became the first publicly traded pure-play quantum computing company on October 1, 2021 after closing its business combination with dMY Technology Group III; began trading on NYSE under IONQ with ~$636M of gross proceeds.

IonQ reported Q3 2021 results on November 15, 2021; year-to-date total contract value bookings of $15.1M and raised 2021 TCV guidance to $15.8M, evidence the commercial quantum-cloud business is producing early revenue.

adds.rationale: Established robotic-surgery franchise with a fresh 10-million-procedure milestone confirming structural adoption; adds a profitable robotics pure-play to complement the broader BOTZ and ARKQ thematic ETFs the watchlist already holds.

news_evidence.summary: Intuitive Surgical announced on December 14, 2021 that surgeons have now performed more than 10 million procedures worldwide using da Vinci systems, with 6,500+ systems installed in 67 countries and 55,000+ trained surgeons.

Q3 2021 worldwide da Vinci procedures grew ~20% year over year, with shipments and installed base both expanding into the post-pandemic recovery, indicating the robotic-surgery wave is in a healthy buildup phase.

rationale_overall: Two adds fill the two open slots in a 16-cap watchlist with zero removes. IONQ opens the quantum bucket the profile named as a next wave but the current watchlist did not cover; ISRG adds a profitable robotics pure-play behind the BOTZ/ARKQ thematic ETF exposure. No removes because the AI core (AAPL/MSFT/GOOGL/NVDA/SPY/SMH) is still in clear buildup at this date and the rocket/uranium next-wave bets are too young to judge. Engineered biology is excluded per the profile.
